name: Zigbee2MQTT
description: Zigbee to MQTT bridge, get rid of your proprietary Zigbee bridges
compose:
name: slashnode-zigbee2mqtt
services:
  app:
    image: koenkk/zigbee2mqtt:2.12.0
    container_name: app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    privileged: true
    environment:
      ZIGBEE2MQTT_CONFIG_FRONTEND_ENABLED: 'true'
      ZIGBEE2MQTT_CONFIG_FRONTEND_PORT: '8080'
      ZIGBEE2MQTT_CONFIG_MQTT_SERVER: mqtt://mosquitto_broker_1:1883
      Z2M_ONBOARD_NO_REDIRECT: '1'
    volumes:
      - app_data:/app/data:rw
      - /run/udev:/run/udev:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:60082:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-zigbee2mqtt_app_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (zigbee2mqtt). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://www.zigbee2mqtt.io/. ⚠️ SECURITY: app: runs privileged.
